Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.storage.Memory

Packages that use Memory
Package
Description
com.nib.commons
Common utilities and core runtime components for the NIB application framework.
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.scripting.utils.dbutils
DB API
com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort
SORT
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.

    Constructors in com.nib.commons.storage with parameters of type Memory
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AbstractNDecimal(Memory memory, int offset, int length, int decimals, boolean signed)
    Constructs an instance of AbstractNDecimal with the specified memory, offset, length, number of decimals, and signed representation.
     
    AbstractNElementary(Memory memory, int offset, int length)
    Constructs an AbstractNElementary object with the specified memory, offset, and length.
     
    AbstractNField(Memory memory, int offset, int length)
    Creates a new field of the specified length and allocates it in the specified memory object at a specified offset
     
    AbstractNNumeric(Memory memory, int offset, int length)
    Constructor that initializes the numeric field with a specified memory, offset, and length.
     
    NAddress(Memory s, int o)
    Constructor with memory and offset.
     
    NBinary(Memory memory, int offset, int length)
    Constructs an instance of NBinary with the specified memory, offset, and length.
     
    NChar(Memory memory, int offset, int length)
    Constructs an NChar object with the specified memory, offset, and length.
     
    NCharBin(Memory memory, int offset, int length)
    Constructs a new NCharBin object with the specified memory, offset, and length.
     
    NInt16(Memory memory, int offset)
    Constructs an NInt16 instance with a specified memory object and offset.
     
    NInt32(Memory memory, int offset)
    Constructs a new instance of NInt32 with the specified memory reference and offset.
     
    NInteger(Memory memory, int offset, int length)
    Constructs an NInteger object with the specified parameters.
     
    NInteger(Memory memory, int offset, int length, boolean signed, Endianness endianness)
    Constructs an NInteger object with the specified parameters.
     
    NPacked(Memory memory, int offset, int length, int decimals, boolean signed)
    Constructs an instance of NPacked with a reference to a memory block, an offset, a length (number of bytes), a specified number of decimals, and a signed representation option.
     
    NZoned(Memory memory, int offset, int length, int decimals, boolean signed)
    Constructs an instance of NZoned with the specified memory configuration, offset, length, number of decimals, and signed representation.
